---
title: "Expert advice from experts"
author:
- name: Somya Verma
  degrees: BAEco(Hons), MBAt
  email: sver0044@student.monash.edu
- name: Daniel Loza
  degrees: AMusA, BBus, BCom(Hons)
- name: Yunhui Fan
  degrees: BSc(Hons), MBAt
- name: Yixiang Xu
  degrees: BManSc, MBAt
phone: (03) 9905 2478
email: BusEco-Econometrics@monash.edu
organization: 6it Consultants
bibliography: references.bib
format: report-pdf
---

# Executive summary

# Introduction

# Methodology

# Results

# Discussion

# Conclusion

# Recommendations
